John A. Executive
Email: john.executive@email.com | Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Seasoned technology executive with 15+ years of experience driving digital transformation at Fortune 500 companies. Led cross-functional teams of up to 500 people across 12 countries, delivering $200M+ in cumulative cost savings through cloud migration, AI adoption, and process automation initiatives.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Chief Technology Officer | GlobalTech Industries | New York, NY | 2019 – Present
- Led enterprise-wide digital transformation across 3 continents, impacting 8,000+ employees
- Reduced infrastructure costs by $45M annually through cloud-first strategy (AWS/Azure)
- Built and scaled AI/ML division from 5 to 120 data scientists and engineers
- Drove M&A technology due diligence for 4 acquisitions totaling $1.2B
- Established cybersecurity framework that reduced incidents by 78%

VP of Engineering | DataDrive Corp | San Francisco, CA | 2015 – 2019
- Managed 200+ engineers across US, India, and UK offices
- Delivered real-time analytics platform processing 10B events/day
- Achieved 99.99% uptime SLA for mission-critical payment systems
- Reduced time-to-market by 40% through DevOps and CI/CD adoption

Senior Director, Technology | InnovateCo | London, UK | 2011 – 2015
- Spearheaded migration of legacy systems to microservices architecture
- Managed $30M annual technology budget across EMEA region
- Led SOX compliance and GDPR readiness initiatives

Engineering Manager | TechStart Solutions | Toronto, Canada | 2008 – 2011
- Built engineering team from 3 to 45 people
- Launched SaaS platform serving 500+ enterprise clients

EDUCATION
MBA, Technology Management | MIT Sloan School of Management | 2012
B.Sc., Computer Science | University of Toronto | 2007
